meaning: n.巨浪,波浪般滚滚向前的东西v.翻腾
examples: The white sails billow with the breezes they catch.
An angry billow almost swallowed that ship.
Remember to clear concertina sections out when you come back from trips to avoid your unwashed briefs billow out onto the boardroom table.
Recent high winds had caused smoke to billow from the smouldering fire, causing concern for residents.
Recent high winds have caused smoke to billow from the smouldering fire, causing concern from residents.
